title: Id and UTCDate type aliases defined twice in jmap:: and types::
description: pub type Id = String and pub type UTCDate = String are defined identically in both jmap.rs and types.rs. Both are exported from the crate. A contributor reading jmap::Id vs types::Id cannot tell if they are the same concept or intentionally distinct. In practice they are used interchangeably (types.rs structs use types::Id, jmap.rs uses jmap::Id) but there is nothing saying so. This will confuse anyone writing a method that bridges the two modules. Consolidate to one definition and re-export, or add a comment in each file explaining the intentional duplication and why unification is not done.
